map.geoOnly: Select a Geo map to view live markers.

detail.monthEmpty: No detections found in the selected month.
detail.dayEmpty: No detections found on the selected day.
detail.selectDayHint: Choose a specific day to view detections for that day.

empty.title: No data
empty.message: There are no records matching the current filters.

export.emptyMessage: Adjust the filters or wait for more detections to arrive.

info.title: Sizing based on real event workload
info.message: This tool follows the current LightJSC event-centric architecture: metadata ingest, PostgreSQL/pgvector matching, bestshot storage and realtime event delivery. It is not a substitute for multi-stream live video sizing in the browser.

inputs.title: Input parameters
inputs.subtitle: Only the main inputs are shown. All other values stay at their defaults unless customized.
inputs.advancedHint: Custom inputs are hidden and currently use default values. Open them only when you need to fine-tune.

allInOne.label: All-in-one
allInOne.title: Single box deployment
allInOne.description: Fits pilot or small sites with low event throughput and moderate retention.

splitDatabase.label: Split database
splitDatabase.title: Dedicated PostgreSQL/pgvector node
splitDatabase.description: Recommended for most production deployments because PostgreSQL is the first bottleneck for matching and event storage.

splitRealtime.label: Split realtime
splitRealtime.title: Dedicated realtime/webhook node
splitRealtime.description: Useful when many Welcome/Face Stream screens or many subscribers should be isolated from the core ingest node.

requiresArchitectureV2.label: Architecture V2 required
requiresArchitectureV2.title: Architecture review required
requiresArchitectureV2.description: This scale is beyond the safe zone of the current single active ingest architecture. Plan for camera sharding, central queueing and separated workers.

singleActiveNode.title: Core ingest should stay single active
singleActiveNode.message: The current architecture is not ready for active-active ingest on multiple nodes without camera lease or sharding.

splitDatabaseRecommended.title: Dedicated PostgreSQL is recommended
splitDatabaseRecommended.message: As camera count, Peak EPS or watchlist size grows, pgvector search and event writes become the first bottleneck.

splitRealtimeRecommended.title: Separate realtime/webhook node is recommended
splitRealtimeRecommended.message: Many realtime users or webhook subscribers increase egress and queue pressure on the core node.

standbyRecommended.title: Standby node is recommended
standbyRecommended.message: This workload is large enough to justify a warm or hot standby for the primary ingest node.

httpsRequiredForEnrollment.title: Local scan stations require HTTPS
httpsRequiredForEnrollment.message: If USB/local camera scanning is used in the browser, the site must run on HTTPS or an equivalent secure origin.

retentionHigh.title: Retention is quite long
retentionHigh.message: Long retention quickly increases filesystem and PostgreSQL growth. Review archive and cleanup policies.

storageHigh.title: Storage footprint is high
storageHigh.message: Separate data, WAL and bestshot volumes; prefer enterprise SSDs with strong write endurance.

eventRateHigh.title: Peak EPS is high
eventRateHigh.message: High event rates can drive ingest/webhook queues upward and create drops unless architecture or hardware is upgraded.

architectureLimit.title: The current architecture is at its limit
architectureLimit.message: Plan for V2 architecture with camera sharding, central queueing and separated matching/webhook workers.

watchlistLarge.title: Watchlist is very large
watchlistLarge.message: A very large active template set increases RAM/cache demand and HNSW indexing time on PostgreSQL.

liveViewNeedsSeparateSizing.title: Live video needs separate sizing
liveViewNeedsSeparateSizing.message: If the project later adds many browser live streams, size separately for codec, fps, layout and client decode capability.

notes.allInOne: App, workers and DB on one box
notes.metadataOnly: Optimized for metadata, not full video decode
notes.eventUi: Primarily event, chart and map UI

network.subtitle: Network and realtime
network.title: Bandwidth estimate
network.ingestCaption: Estimated metadata + bestshot traffic from cameras into the core node.
network.realtimeCaption: Calculated for {count} concurrent Welcome/Face Stream users.

notes.clientSummary: Uses the highest workstation specification across all workstation groups. Total quantity: {count}.

reset.title: Defaults restored
reset.message: The sizing tool has been reset to the default assumptions.

exportXlsxFailed.title: XLSX export failed
